turns.output: Research brief [claude-opus-4-8]: Northwest Coast material culture: cedar longhouses, monumental totem poles, ocean-going canoes, formline art, temperate rainforest. Watchlist: pan-Plains stereotype (warbonnet, teepee, horse, prairie).
Accuracy constraints [claude-sonnet-5]: coastal rainforest and Pacific shoreline; no teepees; no prairie.
